test_cases.name: health_check_returns_ok
test_cases.description: Health check endpoint returns 200 with ok status

test_cases.name: create_author_with_all_fields
test_cases.description: Create author with name, bio, and born_year

test_cases.name: create_author_with_only_name
test_cases.description: Create author with only required name field

test_cases.name: create_author_with_invalid_born_year
test_cases.description: Create author with born_year outside valid range (0-2026)

test_cases.name: list_authors_with_pagination
test_cases.description: List authors with skip and limit parameters

test_cases.name: get_author_returns_etag
test_cases.description: Get author detail returns ETag header

test_cases.name: get_author_with_if_none_match_returns_304
test_cases.description: Get author with matching If-None-Match header returns 304

test_cases.name: get_nonexistent_author
test_cases.description: Get author with invalid ID returns 404

test_cases.name: update_author_with_etag_match
test_cases.description: Update author with matching If-Match ETag succeeds

test_cases.name: update_author_with_etag_mismatch
test_cases.description: Update author with mismatched If-Match ETag returns 412

test_cases.name: delete_author_with_no_books
test_cases.description: Delete author with no associated books succeeds

test_cases.name: delete_author_with_books_fails
test_cases.description: Delete author with associated books returns 409 Conflict

test_cases.name: create_category_success
test_cases.description: Create category with name and optional description

test_cases.name: create_duplicate_category_name
test_cases.description: Create category with duplicate name returns 409

test_cases.name: list_all_categories
test_cases.description: List all categories without pagination

test_cases.name: create_book_with_all_fields
test_cases.description: Create book with all required fields and optional stock

test_cases.name: create_book_with_duplicate_isbn
test_cases.description: Create book with duplicate ISBN returns 409

test_cases.name: create_book_with_invalid_isbn_length
test_cases.description: Create book with ISBN outside 10-13 character range returns 422

test_cases.name: create_book_with_nonexistent_author
test_cases.description: Create book with invalid author_id returns 404

test_cases.name: list_books_with_pagination
test_cases.description: List books with page and page_size parameters

test_cases.description: List books filtered by search term in title or ISBN

test_cases.name: list_books_with_price_range_filter
test_cases.description: List books filtered by min_price and max_price

test_cases.name: get_book_detail_success
test_cases.description: Get book detail returns full book information with author and category

test_cases.name: get_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Get soft-deleted book returns 410 Gone

test_cases.name: soft_delete_book_success
test_cases.description: Delete book performs soft delete and sets is_deleted flag

test_cases.name: restore_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Restore soft-deleted book clears is_deleted flag

test_cases.name: restore_non_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Restore non-deleted book returns 400 Bad Request

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_old_book
test_cases.description: Apply discount to book published more than 1 year ago

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_new_book
test_cases.description: Apply discount to book published less than 1 year ago returns 400

test_cases.name: apply_discount_with_invalid_percent
test_cases.description: Apply discount with percent outside (0, 50] range returns 422
